summary: Iteration 44 - Scanner Universe Expansion fully tested and verified. All 23 backend tests passed. Universe expanded from ~1000 to 1473 symbols with 6 sector-specific lists and user viewed symbol tracking.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Scanner universe expanded to 1473 symbols. Sector lists: biotech (71), cannabis (25), ev_cleantech (57), crypto (38), quantum_ai (34), spac_ipo (30). User viewed tracker working - tracks symbols from AI chat (smart_context_engine.py) and watchlist add (quick actions). These symbols automatically get added to Tier 1 scanning in wave_scanner.py. All tests passing.
